description: TCEL Tenant-9 Trading/Portfolio package (T9-003), onboarded as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata. Depends on the TCEL Foundation (T9-001) for Manager master data. Entities from the T9-003 schemas (TradingOrder, PortfolioPosition); the TR-001..020 control catalog becomes executable order-time rules where the declarative condition model allows, plus a traceability knowledge asset for the full catalog; TradingRisk.AI is a governed advisory agent (no autonomous execution). The trading-risk register uses the dynamic riskType {category} token. Boundary vs T9-002 (Banking) and T9-004 (Enterprise Risk): this package owns ONLY order management, execution/settlement, portfolio positions, valuation, and trading-risk controls; enterprise-wide risk aggregation is T9-004. Does NOT re-declare RecordReceived - the Foundation provides it.
name: TCEL Trading & Portfolio Management

entities.description: A TCEL trading order through the OMS (T9-003 trading-order.schema.json).
A TCEL portfolio position snapshot (T9-003 portfolio-position.schema.json).
One trading/portfolio risk-register entry. category drives the riskType tag via the dynamic {category} token.

rules.name: Active mandate required
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CIO). Reject an order without an active manager mandate.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-001: order {orderId} rejected - manager {managerId} has no active mandate (CIO).

rules.name: Restricted security check
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CCO). Reject an order in a restricted security.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-002: order {orderId} rejected - security {securityId} is on the restricted list (CCO).

rules.name: Manager instrument authority
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Reject an order the manager is not authorized to trade.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-003: order {orderId} rejected - manager {managerId} lacks authority for this instrument (CRO).

rules.name: Enterprise concentration limit
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Reject or hold an order that breaches enterprise concentration.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-005: order {orderId} rejected - enterprise concentration limit breached (CRO).

rules.name: Available cash and settlement capacity
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Treasury/Operations). Reject an order without sufficient cash/settlement capacity.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-006: order {orderId} rejected - insufficient available cash or settlement capacity (Treasury/Operations).

rules.name: Leverage and margin limit
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Reject an order breaching leverage/margin limits.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-007: order {orderId} rejected - leverage/margin limit breached (CRO).

rules.name: Critical drawdown state
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CRO). Suspend new purchases while in a critical drawdown state.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-008: buy order {orderId} suspended - manager is in a critical drawdown state (CRO).

rules.name: Approved broker/counterparty
rules.description: Preventive/High (Owner: CCO). Reject routing to an unapproved broker.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-009: order {orderId} route rejected - broker {brokerId} is not approved (CCO).

rules.name: Stale price control
rules.description: Detective/High (Owner: Accounting). Flag valuation on a stale price.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-013: price for {securityId} is stale - valuation flagged (Accounting).

rules.name: AI execution boundary
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Model Risk). Deny an agent's attempt to place a trade directly.
rules.reasonTemplate: TR-018: order {orderId} denied - an AI agent may not place or route trades directly; agents are advisory-only (Model Risk).

capabilities.name: TCEL Trading & Portfolio Intelligence
capabilities.description: Order management, execution/settlement, portfolio positions, valuation, trading-risk controls, and the trading-risk register for the TCEL tenant.

performanceFrameworks.name: TCEL Trading Risk Register v1
performanceFrameworks.description: The trading/portfolio risk register as ONE record type + ONE KPI using the dynamic riskType {category} token (MarketRisk, Concentration, Leverage, Settlement, Valuation, Surveillance, ...). Multiplicative index Likelihood x BusinessImpact x ControlGap; higher = worse (direction lower).

agents.name: TradingRisk.AI
agents.description: Governed trading-risk officer across proposed and executed trading activity, manager behavior, portfolio exposures, valuation quality, settlement risk, and enterprise concentration. Advisory-only. Boundary vs BankRisk.AI (T9-002) and EnterpriseRisk.AI (T9-004): TradingRisk.AI owns trading/portfolio risk only.
agents.persona: You are TradingRisk.AI, a governed trading-risk officer for TCEL. You continuously analyze orders and executions, positions, prices, manager mandates, enterprise risk limits, restricted lists, and broker/custodian data; calculate and explain risk; detect patterns; rank risk alternatives; and simulate trade and portfolio effects - grounded ONLY in the approved data you can see, citing the facts, as-of times, and policy/control references you relied on. Every recommendation states manager and enterprise impact, assumptions, confidence, alternatives, and required approvers. You recommend, alert, and escalate; you never place or route trades, change limits, approve exceptions, or alter mandates.
sampleQuestions: Which managers are closest to a position or concentration limit?
Are there unusual cancellation or trade-splitting patterns this week?
What is the enterprise exposure if this proposed order fills?
Where is valuation quality weakest across the book right now?
prohibited: place or route trades; change limits; approve exceptions; alter mandates
clear investigations; modify source evidence; change its own permissions
agents.outputDisclaimer: Advisory only - TradingRisk.AI analyzes and recommends; every trade, limit, mandate, and exception decision is made and executed by an authorized human, not by this agent.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Trading Risk Control Catalog (TR-001..020)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 20 deterministic TR- controls. TR-001/002/003/005/006/007/008/009/013/018 are enforced as executable rules; the remainder (position-limit and fair-allocation holds, execution/position reconciliation breaks, settlement-fail and alert escalation timers, trade-splitting and cancellation surveillance aggregation, manual-price-override and model-version governance) require registry lookup, aggregation, timers, or approval workflow beyond the declarative condition model and are carried for traceability.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: TR-001 Active mandate required | Preventive | Reject order | Critical | CIO. TR-002 Restricted security check | Preventive | Reject order | Critical | CCO. TR-003 Manager instrument authority | Preventive | Reject order | Critical | CRO. TR-004 Manager position limit | Preventive | Reject or hold | High | CRO. TR-005 Enterprise concentration limit | Preventive | Reject or hold | Critical | CRO. TR-006 Available cash and settlement capacity | Preventive | Reject order | Critical | Treasury/Operations. TR-007 Leverage and margin limit | Preventive | Reject order | Critical | CRO. TR-008 Critical drawdown state | Preventive | Suspend new purchases | Critical | CRO. TR-009 Approved broker/counterparty | Preventive | Reject route | High | CCO. TR-010 Fair allocation | Preventive/Detective | Hold and review allocation | High | Operations. TR-011 Execution-to-confirmation match | Detective | Open break | High | Operations. TR-012 Settlement fail escalation | Detective/Corrective | Escalate by age/severity | High | Operations. TR-013 Stale price control | Detective | Flag valuation | High | Accounting. TR-014 Manual price override approval | Preventive | Require independent approval | High | Accounting. TR-015 Position reconciliation | Detective | Open break | High | Operations. TR-016 Trade splitting/limit avoidance | Detective | Aggregate and alert | High | Compliance. TR-017 Unusual cancellation pattern | Detective | Surveillance alert | Medium | Compliance. TR-018 AI execution boundary | Preventive | Deny direct trade execution | Critical | Model Risk. TR-019 Model/version traceability | Governance | Block unapproved model use | Critical | Model Risk. TR-020 Critical alert escalation | Corrective | Assign and escalate | Critical | Trading Risk.
